response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates exceptional technical leadership, deep expertise in software architecture, and a strong background in open-source technologies and Linux-based systems. His experience at Google, Meta, and multiple high-profile roles in IT consulting and project management aligns well with the Head of Development role. While his German proficiency is listed as basic, his technical skills, strategic thinking, and leadership experience are highly relevant, making him a strong candidate for an interview.
strengths: Extensive leadership in software development and architecture at top-tier companies (Google, Meta)
Strong open-source contributions and proficiency in Linux/Unix environments, with a background in D programming and event-driven systems
Proven track record in team mentorship, technical project management, and strategic IT consulting
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as basic (C1 level required), which may impact client interactions in Germany
Limited explicit experience with UML modeling and requirements management, though architecture design and system modeling are covered
Early career involved freelance and smaller projects, though recent roles demonstrate significant growth in leadership and scale
